title: Rich Smoky Turkish Beef Icli Kofte
description: A smoky and pillowy Turkish dish featuring Thai holy basil krapao, perfect for kids and adults alike, this gluten-free friendly meal is made in the form of ici kofte.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the ground beef, chopped onion, minced garlic, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper, mixing well with your hands until just combined.
Stir in the chopped Thai holy basil.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
When ready to cook, use your hands to shape the mixture into small cylindrical kofte, about 1 1/2 inches long and 1 inch in diameter.
Roll each kofte in the fine bulgur to coat, gently pressing the bulgur onto the meat to help it stick.
Place the coated kofte on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, leaving about 1 inch of space between each kofte.
Bake the kofte in the preheated oven for 18 minutes, or until cooked through to an internal temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit.
Remove the kofte from the oven and let them rest for 5 minutes before serving.
